## Slash commands

Type `/` in the composer to open the command picker. Use arrow keys to navigate or keep typing to filter. Press **Tab** to queue a command while a task is running ‚Äî it executes at the end of the current turn.

### All slash commands

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Alias | Purpose | Available during task |
|---------|-------|---------|----------------------|
| [`/model`](#model-and-ai) | ‚Äî | Choose what model and reasoning effort to use | ‚úó |
| [`/providers`](#model-and-ai) | ‚Äî | Configure model providers and BYOK credentials | ‚úì |
| [`/ide`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Include current selection, open files, and other context from your IDE | ‚úì |
| [`/permissions`](#permissions-and-safety) | ‚Äî | Choose what Wizard is allowed to do | ‚úó |
| [`/keymap`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Remap TUI shortcuts | ‚úó |
| [`/vim`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Toggle Vim mode for the composer | ‚úó |
| [`/setup-default-sandbox`](#permissions-and-safety) | ‚Äî | Set up elevated agent sandbox | ‚úó |
| [`/sandbox-add-read-dir`](#permissions-and-safety) | ‚Äî | Let sandbox read a directory: /sandbox-add-read-dir &lt;absolute_path&gt; | ‚úó |
| [`/experimental`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Toggle experimental features | ‚úó |
| [`/approve`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Approve one retry of a recent auto-review denial | ‚úì |
| [`/memories`](#memory) | ‚Äî | Configure memory use and generation | ‚úó |
| [`/skills`](#skills-and-extensions) | ‚Äî | Use skills to improve how Wizard performs specific tasks | ‚úì |
| [`/hooks`](#skills-and-extensions) | ‚Äî | View and manage lifecycle hooks | ‚úì |
| [`/review`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Review my current changes and find issues | ‚úó |
| [`/rename`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Rename the current thread | ‚úì |
| [`/new`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Start a new chat during a conversation | ‚úó |
| [`/resume`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Resume a saved chat | ‚úó |
| [`/fork`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Fork the current chat | ‚úó |
| [`/init`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Wizard | ‚úó |
| [`/compact`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Summarize conversation to prevent hitting the context limit | ‚úó |
| [`/plan`](#long-running-tasks) | ‚Äî | Switch to Plan mode | ‚úó |
| [`/goal`](#long-running-tasks) | ‚Äî | Set or view the goal for a long-running task | ‚úì |
| [`/agent`](#long-running-tasks) | ‚Äî | Switch the active agent thread | ‚úì |
| [`/side`](#long-running-tasks) | ‚Äî | Start a side conversation in an ephemeral fork | ‚úì |
| [`/btw`](#long-running-tasks) | ‚Äî | Start a side conversation in an ephemeral fork | ‚úì |
| [`/copy`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Copy last response as markdown | ‚úì |
| [`/raw`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Toggle raw scrollback mode for copy-friendly terminal selection | ‚úì |
| [`/diff`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Show git diff (including untracked files) | ‚úì |
| [`/mention`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Mention a file | ‚úì |
| [`/status`](#session-info) | ‚Äî | Show current session configuration and token usage | ‚úì |
| [`/config`](#session-info) | ‚Äî | View and manage configuration | ‚úì |
| [`/debug-config`](#session-info) | ‚Äî | Show config layers and requirement sources for debugging | ‚úì |
| [`/title`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Configure which items appear in the terminal title | ‚úì |
| [`/statusline`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Configure which items appear in the status line | ‚úì |
| [`/theme`](#customization) | ‚Äî | Choose a syntax highlighting theme | ‚úó |
| [`/pets`](#customization) | `/pet` | Choose or hide the terminal pet | ‚úó |
| [`/overview`](#review-and-context) | ‚Äî | Render the dbt project overview card | ‚úì |
| [`/mcp`](#skills-and-extensions) | ‚Äî | List configured MCP tools; use /mcp verbose for details | ‚úì |
| [`/apps`](#skills-and-extensions) | ‚Äî | Manage apps | ‚úì |
| [`/plugins`](#skills-and-extensions) | ‚Äî | Browse plugins | ‚úì |
| [`/quit`](#exit) | ‚Äî | Exit Wizard | ‚úì |
| [`/exit`](#exit) | ‚Äî | Exit Wizard | ‚úì |
| [`/feedback`](#session-info) | ‚Äî | Send feedback to maintainers | ‚úì |
| [`/ps`](#background-terminals) | ‚Äî | List background terminals | ‚úì |
| [`/stop`](#background-terminals) | `/clean` | Stop all background terminals | ‚úì |
| [`/clear`](#session-management) | ‚Äî | Clear the terminal and start a new chat | ‚úó |
| [`/personality`](#model-and-ai) | ‚Äî | Choose a communication style for Wizard | ‚úó |

| [`/subagents`](#long-running-tasks) | ‚Äî | Switch the active agent thread | ‚úì |

</SimpleTable>

### Model and AI {#model-and-ai}

Control the AI model, provider, speed, and response style.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/model` | ‚Äî | Choose what model and reasoning effort to use |
| `/providers` | ‚Äî | Configure model providers and BYOK credentials |
| `/personality` | ‚Äî | Choose a communication style for Wizard |

</SimpleTable>

---

### Session management {#session-management}

Start, resume, branch, and clean up sessions.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/new` | ‚Äî | Start a new chat during a conversation |
| `/clear` | ‚Äî | Clear the terminal and start a new chat |
| `/resume` | Yes | Resume a saved chat |
| `/fork` | ‚Äî | Fork the current chat |
| `/compact` | ‚Äî | Summarize conversation to prevent hitting the context limit |
| `/rename` | Yes | Rename the current thread |
| `/init` | ‚Äî | Create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Wizard |

</SimpleTable>

---

### Review and context {#review-and-context}

Pull information into the session or trigger a code review.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/review` | Yes | Review my current changes and find issues |
| `/diff` | ‚Äî | Show git diff (including untracked files) |
| `/mention` | ‚Äî | Mention a file |
| `/copy` | ‚Äî | Copy last response as markdown |
| `/raw` | Yes | Toggle raw scrollback mode for copy-friendly terminal selection |
| `/overview` | ‚Äî | Render the dbt project overview card |
| `/ide` | Yes | Include current selection, open files, and other context from your IDE |

</SimpleTable>

### Permissions and safety {#permissions-and-safety}

Control what Wizard is allowed to execute.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/permissions` | ‚Äî | Choose what Wizard is allowed to do |
| `/setup-default-sandbox` | ‚Äî | Set up elevated agent sandbox |
| `/sandbox-add-read-dir` | Yes | Let sandbox read a directory: /sandbox-add-read-dir &lt;absolute_path&gt; |

</SimpleTable>

### Customization {#customization}

Appearance, keybindings, and UI preferences.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/theme` | ‚Äî | Choose a syntax highlighting theme |
| `/keymap` | Yes | Remap TUI shortcuts |
| `/vim` | ‚Äî | Toggle Vim mode for the composer |
| `/statusline` | ‚Äî | Configure which items appear in the status line |
| `/title` | ‚Äî | Configure which items appear in the terminal title |
| `/experimental` | ‚Äî | Toggle experimental features |
| `/approve` | ‚Äî | Approve one retry of a recent auto-review denial |
| `/pets` (alias: /pet) | Yes | Choose or hide the terminal pet |

</SimpleTable>

### Skills and extensions {#skills-and-extensions}

Manage capabilities Wizard can use during a session.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/skills` | ‚Äî | Use skills to improve how Wizard performs specific tasks |
| `/hooks` | ‚Äî | View and manage lifecycle hooks |

| `/apps` | ‚Äî | Manage apps |

</SimpleTable>

### Long-running tasks {#long-running-tasks}

Manage multi-turn goals, parallel agents, and branched conversations.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/plan` | Yes | Switch to Plan mode |
| `/goal` | Yes | Set or view the goal for a long-running task |
| `/agent` | ‚Äî | Switch the active agent thread |
| `/subagents` | ‚Äî | Switch the active agent thread |
| `/side` | Yes | Start a side conversation in an ephemeral fork |
| `/btw` | Yes | Start a side conversation in an ephemeral fork |

</SimpleTable>

### Background terminals {#background-terminals}

Inspect and control shell processes Wizard has running in the background.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/ps` | ‚Äî | List background terminals |
| `/stop` (alias: /clean) | ‚Äî | Stop all background terminals |

</SimpleTable>

### Memory {#memory}

Control how Wizard stores and uses memory across sessions.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/memories` | ‚Äî | Configure memory use and generation |

</SimpleTable>

Inspect the current session state without changing anything.

<SimpleTable>

| Command | Inline args | Description |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/status` | ‚Äî | Show current session configuration and token usage |
| `/config` | ‚Äî | View and manage configuration |
| `/debug-config` | ‚Äî | Show config layers and requirement sources for debugging |
| `/feedback` | ‚Äî | Send feedback to maintainers |
